nasb.text: and *said to Him, “If You are the Son of God, throw Yourself down; for it is written, ‘He will command His angels concerning You’; and ‘On  their  hands they will bear You up, So that You will not strike Your foot against a stone.’ ”

esv.text: and said to him, “If you are the Son of God, throw yourself down, for it is written, “‘He will command his angels concerning you,’ and “‘On their hands they will bear you up, lest you strike your foot against a stone.’”

cnv.text: 對他說：“你若是　神的兒子，就跳下去吧！因為經上記著： ‘　神為了你， 會吩咐自己的使者用手托住你， 免得你的腳碰到石頭。’”

ccb.text: 说：“如果你是上帝的儿子，就跳下去吧！因为圣经上说，‘上帝会差遣祂的天使用手托住你，不让你的脚碰在石头上。’”

csbs.text: 对他说：“你如果是神的儿子，就跳下去吧！因为经上记着： ‘他会为你吩咐他的天使； 他们会用手托住你， 免得你的脚撞在石头上。’  ”
